title: UltraLowFire
description: Makes fire almost invisible that helps you at pvp
body:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



</details>

# UltraLowFire

A clean and lightweight Minecraft PvP resource pack that removes the fire overlay when the player is burning, giving a much clearer screen during combat. Designed for players who want better visibility in fights, crystal PvP, sword PvP, bedwars, skywars, and survival gameplay.

Features:
• Invisible burning overlay
• Better PvP visibility
• Cleaner combat experience
• Lightweight and optimized
• Smooth gameplay experience
• Compatible with most Minecraft versions
• Minimal and simple design

This pack only changes the fire overlay textures while keeping the normal Minecraft style as clean as possible.
